1133.issue: [W1133] [io-package.json](https://github.com/raschy/ioBroker.airquality/blob/master/io-package.json): instanceObject "info.lastUpdate" role "date.end" expects common.type to be one of [boolean], but found "number"

1144.issue: [E1144] Untranslated "common.news" entries detected (identical to English text): ru(0.1.1).

2008.issue: [S2008] Version 0.1.7 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

3032.issue: [W3032] No workflow run for "test-and-release.yml" triggered by tag "v0.1.7" was found for current release 0.1.7. Workflow logs might be deleted already.

5005.issue: [S5005] Plain setTimeout() found in source files (src/main.ts). Please use this.setTimeout() or adapter.setTimeout() instead.

5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (src/main.ts). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/raschy/ioBroker.airquality/blob/master/io-package.json).

5063.issue: [W5063] JSON formatting in "package.json" is hard to read (inconsistent indentation). Please use consistent indentation and proper line breaks.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

6022.issue: [S6022] CHANGELOG_OLD.md exists but no link to it was found in [README.md](https://github.com/raschy/ioBroker.airquality/blob/master/README.md). Consider adding a link to CHANGELOG_OLD.md at the end of the Changelog section.

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#99] "[iobroker-bot] Drop Node.js 20 support (End of Life)"](https://github.com/raschy/ioBroker.airquality/issues/99)

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

0036.issue: [E0036] @alcalzone/release-script 5.2.0 specified. 5.2.1 is required as minimum,  5.2.1 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/raschy/ioBroker.airquality/blob/master/package.json)

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. The current engines.node clause ">= 20" allows Node.js 20.0.0 as minimum. Please update it to require at least ">=22" at [package.json](https://github.com/raschy/ioBroker.airquality/blob/master/package.json).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.8.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/raschy/ioBroker.airquality/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.

0078.issue: [W0078] Remove obsolete eslint/prettier devDependencies when using "@iobroker/eslint-config": @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin, @typescript-eslint/parser.
